name: Jane Doe
headline: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Backend engineer with 8 years building distributed systems in TypeScript and Go. Comfortable with Postgres, Kafka, and Kubernetes. Loves small teams shipping frequently.

experience.title: Staff Engineer
bullets: Led migration of billing service from monolith to event-sourced microservices, cutting p99 latency 60%.
Mentored 4 engineers; ran the on-call rotation health initiative.

experience.title: Senior Engineer
bullets: Built the multi-region replication layer for the search index.
